title: neottia major
intro: Neottia major, commonly known as greater twayblade, is a perennial orchid plant species that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, Neottia major has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Neottia major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
